use_cases: Visualizing browser or market share trends over time with stacked proportional data
Displaying time-series analytics for SaaS product metrics
Showing traffic source breakdown in web analytics dashboards
Rendering categorical time-series data with gradient fills
Displaying user engagement or usage patterns across multiple categories
ai_summary: A stacked area chart component built with visx that renders time-series data with proportional stacked areas and gradient fills. The chart displays categorical breakdowns (like browser usage) over time with a coral background and rounded container. Designed for analytics dashboards and data visualization in SaaS, fintech, and media applications.
